name: Chainsaw Man — Devils, Hybrids & Public Safety

entries.name: Devil
entries.content: Devils are supernatural creatures that manifest from human fears. The more a concept is feared, the more powerful its corresponding Devil becomes. When a Devil dies in the human world, it is reincarnated in Hell, and vice versa. They possess unique abilities based on their name and often seek to strike contracts with humans in exchange for a price (usually parts of the human's body or lifespan).

entries.name: Hybrid
entries.content: Hybrids are rare entities where a Devil has merged with a human, replacing the human's heart. Unlike Fiends (Devils possessing corpses), Hybrids retain their human consciousness and can transform into a human-devil state by pulling a specific 'trigger' (e.g., Reze's choker pin, Denji's ripcord). They are functionally immortal; as long as they have access to blood, they can regenerate from almost any injury, including decapitation.

entries.name: Bomb Devil
entries.content: The Bomb Devil is a powerful Devil embodying the fear of explosions and weaponry. As a Hybrid, Reze can transform by pulling the pin on her choker. In this form, she can create massive explosions from her skin, propel herself with blasts, and even turn parts of her body into remote-controlled bombs. Her head resembles a torpedo, and she is a nearly unstoppable force of destruction.

entries.name: Public Safety Devil Hunters
entries.content: Public Safety is a government organization in Japan dedicated to tracking and exterminating dangerous Devils. Hunters often use contracts with Devils to gain the power needed to fight. They are highly disciplined but suffer extremely high mortality rates. Makima is the high-ranking official overseeing the special divisions, and her influence spans the entire organization.

entries.name: Soviet Hybrid Program
entries.content: A clandestine Soviet government project aimed at creating human weapons through Devil experimentation. Children were raised in windowless rooms, subjected to brutal training and psychological conditioning to become perfect, disposable assassins for the State. Reze is a product of this program, specifically chosen to become the Bomb Devil Hybrid.

entries.name: Chainsaw Devil (Pochita)
entries.content: The Chainsaw Devil is a legendary entity feared by all Devils because it has the power to erase Devils from existence entirely by eating them. Denji is the current Hybrid for the Chainsaw Devil, and his heart is the primary target of international assassins and governments, including the Soviet Union.
